features: Created especially for coloured hair, Dove Colour Care Shampoo keeps your hair colour vibrant for up to ten weeks
Enriched with vibrant colour Lock Technology to keep your hair colour vibrant and fresh for longer
This shampoo for dyed hair nourishes your hair so that it feels silky, beautiful and strong after washing
Leaves coloured hair feeling silky and manageable every day
With regular use, Dove Colour Care Shampoo progressively moisturises your hair
description: Product Description You've finally found that perfect shade, and want to do all you can to protect your fresh hair colour? Designed specifically for dyed hair, Dove Colour Care Shampoo, when used together with our colour care Conditioner, helps to keep colour vibrant for up to ten weeks. Its unique formula is enriched with vibrant colour Lock Technology to keep your hair colour radiant and fresh for up to 40 washes (Shampoo and conditioner system vs. Non-conditioning shampoo). gentle enough for everyday use, this shampoo for colour-treated hair Provides two-way care - instantly smoothing while progressively nourishing your hair to make it feel and look beautiful. Enjoy excellent hair care with the best Shampoo for coloured hair in the Dove range and experience Its deeply nourishing properties. Stun the world with noticeably softer, silkier hair and long-lasting colour. For the best results, use as a system with Dove Colour Care Conditioner to provide the ultimate protection to your favourite hair colour. How to use: simply apply Dove Colour Care Shampoo to wet hair, lather and rinse. It washes cleanly away revealing smooth, vibrant looking hair. Follow up with Dove Colour Care Conditioner. Smooth the colour-protecting conditioner into your hair, focusing on mid-lengths to ends and rinse. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Dimethiconol, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Glycol Distearate, Carbomer, Gluconolactone, Citric Acid, PEG-45M, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, TEA-Sulfate, Cocamide MEA, Sodium Sulfate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Mica, Trehalose, Disodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Benzophenone-4, Silica, BHT, PPG-9, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 77891. Directions Simply apply Dove Colour Care shampoo to wet hair, lather and rinse. It washes cleanly away revealing smooth, vibrant looking hair. Follow up with Dove Colour Care conditioner. Smooth the colour-protecting conditioner into your hair, focusing on mid-lengths to ends and rinse. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water.
